welcome.title: Welcome to Ahmad's portfolio!
welcome.desc1: Navigate through this portfolio like you would on a classic operating system.
welcome.desc2: Right click, open the start menu, click on desktop icons... Navigate as you wish!
welcome.desc3: I rebuilt this portfolio around my work: Linux, open source, Rust, TypeScript, dev tooling, P2P systems, GUI/TUI apps, and Web3 contracts.
welcome.desc4: You can learn more by right clicking on the desktop and clicking on "About".

app.aboutme.content.title: I'm Ahmad Munir.
app.aboutme.content.subtitle: Software Engineer focused on Rust, Linux and open source.
app.aboutme.content.desc: I'm a 19-year-old software engineer at PlayProject and a Computer Science student at the University of Gujrat. I'm obsessed with Linux and open source, and I love building with Rust, C, Elixir and TypeScript. My interests sit around P2P systems, developer tooling, TUI/GUI apps, and Web3 smart contracts.
app.aboutwebsite.content.useadvice: Use this portfolio like you would use a real operating system.
